message:
feat(python): numpy.fft.ifft wrapper parity (franken_numpy-m1k3)

Add fnp_python.ifft(a, n=None, axis=-1, norm=None, out=None) as a
passthrough delegator to np.fft.ifft preserving the optional
truncation/zero-padding length n, axis selector, all three norm
conventions ('backward'/'ortho'/'forward'), optional `out=`
destination, and complex output dtype across real/complex inputs.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with seven scenarios: real 1-D
default, ifft(fft(x)) round-trip identity, n=16 zero-padded from
length 8, norm='ortho' (symmetric scaling), norm='forward'
(no inverse scaling), 2-D input with axis=0, and complex128 1-D.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
